opportunity.title: Jeriko – an AI agent that runs directly inside your OS
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: Running agents at the OS level introduces interesting tradeoffs around syscall hooks versus kernel modules for tool invocation. You'll want to carefully consider how your agent handles file descriptor inheritance during process forks, as this can be a subtle source of permission escalation that most sandboxed agent frameworks don't fully address.
actions.reasoning: I have hands-on experience building AI agent infrastructure, including multi-provider LLM routing, tool orchestration, and system-level agent integration patterns
